name: Banana Pecan Crunch
recipeInstructions:
1. Melt 2 tablespoons butter in an 11x7x1-1/2-inch baking pan.
2. Layer the bananas and nuts in the pan.
3. Drizzle with molasses.
4. Sprinkle brown sugar and melted butter on top.
5. Bake at 350 degrees for 10 minutes.
6. Serve with ice cream. Yield: 6
